data.title: General President O'Brien to rally with CSU Teamsters in San Francisco fighting for contractually obligated raises on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: Teamsters have initiated a strike demanding contractually promised raises. General President Sean M. O'Brien will stand in solidarity with the striking California State University (CSU) Teamsters at San Francisco State University on Feb. 17. The exact figures of the raises and the number of teamsters participating in the strike were not specified. The strike is expected to continue until a resolution is reached.

data.title: Meta-analysis confirms 308 nm Excimer laser's efficacy for plaque psoriasis; supported by Georgetown Univ study (February 2026).
data.description: A recent study released in February 2026 by Georgetown University reveals a compelling trend in the use of Excimer laser UVB treatments for inflammatory skin conditions. The study underscores the effectiveness of optimized and targeted strategies using Excimer laser UVB therapy. This emerging approach is gaining traction due to a growing body of clinical evidence supporting its efficacy. Dermatologists and healthcare professionals are increasingly turning to this method, with a notable increase in the number of patients benefiting from the treatment. The study highlights the importance of tailored and precise Excimer laser UVB strategies in managing inflammatory skin conditions, offering new hope for patients seeking relief.

data.title: Palo Alto Networks to acquire Koi for Agentic Endpoint Security, reducing enterprise risks. (Words: 19)
data.description: Agentic Endpoint Security is positioned as the new leader in enterprise risk reduction, bridging the AI security gap. The rise of AI technology has significantly boosted workforce efficiency but has also led to an unmanaged attack surface on numerous endpoints. This groundbreaking solution aims to address this issue by providing comprehensive security measures. Announced in Santa Clara, California on February 17, 2026, this innovation marks a critical step forward in safeguarding businesses.

data.title: EMA to host webinar on making automation smarter with observability and analytics. AI insights improve outcomes at scale.
data.description: A recent study has showcased the benefits of utilizing AI-driven analytics to enhance automation on a large scale. Taking place on February 17, 2026, in Lafayette, Colo., Enterprise Management Associates (EMA™), a reputable IT research and consulting organization, revealed plans to conduct a live webinar focusing on the topic of How to Make Automation More Efficient. This event aims to provide valuable insights into maximizing automation results by incorporating artificial intelligence technologies.

data.title: LGI Homes beat Q4 earnings estimate by 4.3% with EPS of $0.97, revenue down $83.43 million. Missed historical EPS by $0.09.
data.description: On Tuesday, February 17, 2026 at 08:00 AM, LGI Homes (NASDAQ: LGIH) disclosed its Q4 earnings. LGI Homes exceeded anticipated earnings by 4.3%, revealing an EPS of $0.97 compared to an estimated $0.93. Revenue witnessed a decline of $83.43 million from the prior year's corresponding period. Historical earnings data show that the company fell short on EPS by $0.09. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Franklin Electric Q4 earnings missed estimates by 2.25%, EPS $0.87. Revenue up $21.11 million from last year.
data.description: Franklin Electric (NASDAQ: FELE) disclosed its Q4 financial results on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, at 08:00 AM. The company fell short of expected earnings by -2.25%, posting an EPS of $0.87 compared to the estimated $0.89. Revenue saw a $21.11 million increase from the previous year. In the prior quarter, Franklin Electric exceeded EPS forecasts by $0.02, leading to a 0.02% rise in share price. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: NeuroOne Medical Tech (NASDAQ: NMTC) exceeded Q1 estimated earnings by 25.0%, reporting EPS of $-0.03. Revenue down $381k from last year.
data.description: NeuroOne Medical Tech (NASDAQ: NMTC) recently released its Q1 earnings on February 17, 2026, at 08:00 AM. The report indicates a strong performance with earnings surpassing expectations by 25.0%, showing an EPS of $-0.03 compared to the estimated $-0.04. However, there was a decrease in revenue by $381,000 compared to the previous year. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Kite Realty Gr Trust (NYSE: KRG) beat earnings by 96.15% in Q4, reporting $0.51 EPS vs. $0.26 estimate. Revenue down $9.78M.
data.description: Kite Realty Gr Trust (NYSE: KRG) released its Q4 earnings on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, at 08:00 AM, surprising investors. The company surpassed estimated earnings by an impressive 96.15%, with an EPS of $0.51 compared to the expected $0.26. However, revenue saw a decline of $9.78 million compared to the previous year. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Harmony Biosciences gets FDA approval for WAKIX® (pitolisant) for pediatric narcolepsy cataplexy; first non-scheduled treatment.
data.description: In Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, Harmony Biosciences shared that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has given the green light to its supplemental new drug application (sNDA) for WAKIX® (pitolisant) tablets to treat cataplexy in pediatric patients aged 6 and above with narcolepsy. WAKIX now stands out as the sole non-scheduled FDA-approved treatment for both adult and pediatric narcolepsy patients, whether they exhibit cataplexy or not, marking a significant milestone for the company.

data.title: Boyd increases liquid cooling manufacturing capacity in Mexico; doubles Juarez Thermal facility to meet AI data center demand.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, Boyd has announced a significant expansion at its Juarez Thermal facility, aimed at increasing the production capacity of its liquid cooling systems to meet the surging demand from AI data centers. The facility's size will be doubled to accommodate this growth, reflecting the company's commitment to scale up operations. This move comes in response to the increasing need for efficient cooling solutions in the rapidly expanding AI data center market.

data.title: Butterfly Network to attend TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3, 2026 in Boston. Key figures: $BFLY (NYSE) - Joseph DeVivo, John Doherty, Megan Carlson.
data.description: Butterfly Network, Inc. (NYSE: BFLY), a digital health company revolutionizing healthcare with semiconductor chip-based ultrasound technology, software, and AI, disclosed its attendance at the TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference in Boston on March 3, 2026. The key executives present will be Joseph DeVivo, serving as President, Chief Executive Officer, and Chairman; John Doherty, as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer; and Megan Carlson, acting as Senior Vice President of Accounting and Finance. The event aims to showcase their innovations to a broader audience.

data.title: Hellmann's teams up with Toronto Raptors' Brandon Ingram for Starting Five Flavours campaign; highlights Chipotle, Garlic, Spicy, Buttermilk Ranch, Garlic Parmesan. Mascots represent each flavor.
data.description: Toronto-based company Hellmann's Canada has partnered with Toronto Raptors player Brandon Ingram in a new campaign showcasing the brand's five signature flavors: Chipotle, Garlic, Spicy, Buttermilk Ranch, and Garlic Parmesan. The promotion emphasizes Hellmann's as the Official Mayonnaise of the Raptors, urging fans to elevate their game day snacks with these tasty options. The initiative includes five mascots, each representing a specific flavor, aiming to engage fans with this unique collaboration.

data.title: Paladin EnviroTech opens first Recycle Local Satellite Facility in Laurel, MD, offering secure e-waste recycling to small and mid-sized organizations.
data.description: A company called Paladin has introduced enterprise-level electronics recycling and on-site data destruction services in Laurel, Maryland, catering to small and mid-sized businesses. This service aims to provide secure disposal of electronic devices while ensuring data security. Paladin offers these services to organizations looking for safe and efficient ways to handle e-waste.

data.title: ISS recommends Jack in the Box shareholders vote "FOR" all 10 director nominees, including Chair David Goebel.
data.description: San Diego-based Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) disclosed that Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) has advised shareholders to vote "FOR" all 10 of the Company's director nominees, such as David Goebel, Independent Chair of the Board, using the WHITE proxy card for the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. This recommendation pertains to the event scheduled for [date not provided].
